name: 5" Christmas Stuffed Soft Fabric Basketball Embroidered Face - Wondershop™
description:
Add a fun dash of sporty style to your tree with this 5-Inch Stuffed Soft-Fabric Basketball Embroidered Face and Felt Leg Dangles Red Hang String from Wondershop™. Made from polyester, this hanging basketball ornament features an orange stuffed round top with black eyes and a smile along with black embroidered seams. It also has dangling red felt legs with black boots and white socks that swing around with every move for a whimsical, playful look. Plus, it has a built-in hanging loop on top for easy placement on your tree.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
